description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts Electrocute. Enemies afflicted with Electrocute are stunned for [3 sec->2sec].

For 6sec, restores HP every 1sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take [ (added) 60%] reduced [ (added) Magic] DMG. [(removed) CC immunity, 50% reduced All DMG]
For [15 sec->7sec], increases the ATK of all allies by [???->206*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], Attack Speed by [350->42%], and Critical Rate by [350->150].

Every 15sec, deals Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts Electrocute for 20sec, and stuns the target for [1 sec->0.6sec] on a Critical Hit. Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with Electrocute, stacking up to 3 times. Electrocute: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [25%->10%] for 10 sec.

light.unified: You are immune to status ailments while casting. [(removed) Allies take 25% less DMG]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1 additional Mana Cost->1000], and each heal additionally restores 5% of the target's Max HP.

light.unified: Restores [1 orb of Mana->1000 Mana] to all allies.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, and additionally increases Crit DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by [300->200%] and their Mana by [200->100] per sec for 5 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec.

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a [???%->30%] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {1}% for [???->10] sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for [2->0.5] sec.
